title: Ho Ho Creepers 🎅
description: Brings holiday cheer (and explosions) with Christmas-themed Creepers.
body:
**🎅 Ho Ho Creepers 🎄**

Bring explosive holiday cheer to your Minecraft world with Ho Ho Creepers!
This festive mod adds 5 brand-new Christmas-themed Creepers, each with unique drops and fun holiday mechanics.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**❄️ New Xmas Creepers 🎅**

🍬 Candy Creeper
Drops tasty Candy Canes.

🎁 Creeper Clause
Shoots snowballs and drops Christmas Gifts.

🍪 Gingerbread Creeper
Drops delicious Gingerbread.

🔔 Jingle Bombs
Explodes with festive spirit and drops Jingle Bells.

☃️ Snow Boom
Drops Snow that can actually be eaten!

![xmas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdb4cf5bd1b07c36bd3678b5af6155b21ea2305e.jpeg)
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
**✨ Features 🎄**

Fully Christmas-themed creepers

Fun and unique holiday drops

Perfect for seasonal worlds or festive modpacks

Smooth animations powered by **GeckoLib**

Spawns in the overworld / Nether / End / Modded Dimensions
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
